# Zipytiny: AI Study Notes from Video, PDF, Slides & Articles

Welcome to the AI-optimized documentation directory for **Zipytiny**, the AI-powered learning platform that turns videos, PDFs, slide decks, articles, and notes into clear summaries, key concepts, flashcards, mind maps, and study-ready notes in seconds.

- **Primary URL**: https://www.zipytiny.app/
- **Alias Domains**: https://zipytiny.app/
- **Core Purpose**: Empowering students, researchers, and professionals to stop rewatching hours of lectures and reading long PDFs. Zipytiny processes multimedia and documents (YouTube, Vimeo, local MP4/WebM videos, MP3/WAV audio, PDFs, Word, PowerPoint slides, and articles) and instantly synthesizes high-fidelity study notes, timeline chapters, interactive quizzes, flashcard decks, visual mind maps, and PowerPoint presentations.

---

## 💰 Pricing Tiers
- **Free Plan**: $0/forever — core summarization features and AI study notes.
- **Pro Plan**: $12/month — unlimited video, PDF & document uploads, mind maps, quizzes, and video-to-PowerPoint export.
- **Enterprise Plan**: $39/month — highest processing limits, team folders, dedicated support, and API webhooks.

---

## 🎯 Core Capabilities & Features

### 1. Multi-Format Input & Document Processing
- **Video & Audio**: YouTube URLs, Vimeo links, local MP4, WebM, MOV, MP3, WAV, and audio recordings.
- **Documents & Slides**: PDF handouts, Word files (.docx), PowerPoint presentations (.pptx), Excel sheets, raw text, and web articles.
- **OCR Screenshot Extraction**: Upload images or screenshots containing text or lecture slides for automatic extraction.

### 2. Cognitive Learning Artifacts
- **AI Study Notes & Syllabus**: Structured academic outlines, core thesis statements, and key vocabulary.
- **Active Recall Flashcards**: Spaced-repetition card decks generated directly from uploaded materials.
- **Interactive Quizzes**: Practice tests with detailed explanatory rationales for self-testing.
- **Visual Mind Maps**: Hierarchical concept graphs mapping dependencies and ideas.
- **PowerPoint Export**: Pro users can export key points directly into a formatted PowerPoint presentation.
- **Audio Voiceovers (TTS)**: Studio-grade voiceovers to listen to summaries on the go.

### 3. Multi-Language Adaptability
- Translates and summarizes content in over 15 world languages, including English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Portuguese, Hindi, and Arabic (with complete RTL reading support).

---
